creator: ale_sagra@hotmail.com
text:
Hello Fernando,
thanks for getting back to me, I see the patch is applying fine for me, let me update the file again just in case current one is corrupted.

patch -p0 --dry-run < /tmp/2.19.0-py-oci.patch
Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff -urN /usr/ports/devel/py-oci/Makefile py-oci/Makefile
|--- /usr/ports/devel/py-oci/Makefile	2020-07-22 09:46:08.000000000 +0000
|+++ py-oci/Makefile	2020-07-28 17:29:11.906769000 +0000
--------------------------
Patching file /usr/ports/devel/py-oci/Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
The text leading up to this was:
--------------------------
|diff -urN /usr/ports/devel/py-oci/distinfo py-oci/distinfo
|--- /usr/ports/devel/py-oci/distinfo	2020-07-22 09:46:08.000000000 +0000
|+++ py-oci/distinfo	2020-07-28 17:29:13.051684000 +0000
--------------------------
Patching file /usr/ports/devel/py-oci/distinfo using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 1.
done

Thank you
